## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore

## Validation

- [ ] `ruff check src tests`
- [ ] `pytest`

## Checklist

- [ ] I reviewed my own changes
- [ ] I updated docs/README if needed
- [ ] I did not commit secrets
